overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a green jacket exploring a dilapidated apartment interior. The character moves through decaying rooms and hallways illuminated only by a flashlight, examining peeling wallpaper, damaged ceilings, and abandoned furniture in a tense, atmospheric setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: decaying bedroom with peeling wallpaper and damaged ceiling

events.description: character looks upward to examine the water-damaged ceiling with the flashlight

agents.ego_description: walking around the small bedroom, examining the peeling wallpaper and damaged ceiling with a flashlight

entered.detail: small wooden table with papers on it against the wall
metal-frame bed with disheveled bedding
window with metal bars showing darkness outside
severely deteriorating wall covering with stains and tears
small red-shaded lamp mounted on the wall
crumbling plaster with exposed lath and water damage

segments.scene_description: The character explores a small, decaying bedroom illuminated only by flashlight. The walls are covered in peeling wallpaper, the ceiling shows severe water damage, and a single bed sits against the right wall. The character pans upward to examine the crumbling ceiling before continuing to look around the confined space.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark corridor with blue painted trim

events.description: character exits the bedroom through a doorway into a narrow hallway

agents.ego_description: proceeding cautiously down the narrow corridor, illuminating doorways and wall decorations with the flashlight

entered.detail: walls with blue painted trim along the base and door frames
closed wooden doors lining the corridor
framed photograph hanging on the hallway wall
open doorway leading to another room at the end of the hall

segments.scene_description: The character exits the bedroom into a narrow, dark hallway with blue trim along the walls. The flashlight illuminates closed wooden doors and a framed picture on the wall as the character walks toward an open doorway at the far end of the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: derelict living room with green wallpaper

events.description: character enters a larger living room area from the hallway

agents.ego_description: entering the living room and surveying the abandoned furniture, noting the ceiling fan, sofa, and damaged fireplace

entered.detail: faded green striped wallpaper covering the living room walls
old ceiling fan with dust-covered blades
upholstered sofa with a blanket draped over it
old CRT television set on a stand
brick fireplace with wooden mantel and debris
tall standing lamp with white shade
wooden paneling on the lower half of the walls
window or opening covered with wooden planks

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the hallway into a larger living room with faded green wallpaper and wooden wainscoting. The space contains abandoned furniture including a sofa, television, and floor lamp, with a ceiling fan overhead. A boarded-up window is visible on the far left wall, and the room shows signs of decay and neglect.

events.description: character enters the adjacent kitchen area from the living room

agents.ego_description: briefly inspecting the kitchen cabinets and appliances before turning back toward the living room

entered.detail: wooden overhead and lower cabinets with worn finish
old white refrigerator with closed doors
sink with faucet under a small window
white electric stove with oven

segments.scene_description: The character steps into a small kitchenette with wooden cabinets and a white refrigerator. The space is cramped with a stove and sink visible. After a brief look around, the character turns to head back toward the living room.

scene_state.functional_zone: living room with heavily boarded wall section

events.description: character returns to the living room and approaches a boarded-up wall

agents.ego_description: walking toward a heavily boarded-up section of the wall, examining a small hole in the boards

entered.detail: faded green striped wallpaper covering the living room walls
upholstered sofa with a blanket draped over it
tall standing lamp with white shade

segments.scene_description: The character returns to the living room and approaches a section of wall covered with heavy wooden planks. Moving closer, the character examines a small hole in the boards, peering through it as the segment ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a series of decaying domestic spaces, transitioning from a claustrophobic bedroom into a larger, derelict living area. It begins in a small bedroom with peeling wallpaper and a water-damaged ceiling, where the flashlight pans upward before the character exits into a narrow, dark hallway accented with blue trim. As the character moves past closed wooden doors and a framed picture, the scene opens into a spacious living room featuring faded green wallpaper, abandoned furniture, and a boarded-up window. The camera then pushes further into a cramped kitchenette with wooden cabinets and a white refrigerator before turning back toward the main room. Finally, the movement concludes as the character approaches a wall of heavy wooden planks to peer through a small hole in the boards.
